description: You are a product marketing manager who needs to create a sales dashboard with drill-down details provided via a custom tooltip using the sales data located at `C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv`. Create a Power BI report and save it to `C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tooltip_Report.pbix`. The report must include a DAX measure named `Avg_Unit_Price` (average of Unit_Price). Develop a 'Sales Overview' page containing a Clustered Column Chart showing `Sales_Amount` by `Product_Category` and a Line Chart showing `Sales_Amount` by `Sale_Date`. Create a second page named 'Category Detail' configured as a tooltip page, featuring cards for `Avg_Unit_Price` and `Quantity_Sold`, and a Stacked Bar Chart showing `Sales_Amount` by `Payment_Method`. Configure the Clustered Column Chart on the 'Sales Overview' page to use the 'Category Detail' page as its tooltip. Login: user `Docker`, no password.
